div.p: Module: Function JIT (M3) Constraint: Strict symmetry with Prologue (M3-04) Architecture: x86_64 / System V AMD64 ABI

ol.li: Total Frame Size: Calculated as local_size + callee_saved_size + alignment_padding.
Stack Alignment: Epilogue must ensure RSP is 16-byte aligned before the call instructions, but ret expects RSP at [original_rsp - 8].
Leaf Optimization: If no stack is used and no registers saved, emit only ret.

div.p: Assembly: add rsp, <frame_size> Logic: Reclaim stack space allocated for locals. Invariant: RSP must align to top of callee-saved register block.
Assembly: pop r12, pop rbx Order: LIFO recovery. Must match inverse of prologue pushes. State: Registers R12/RBX now hold caller values.
Assembly: pop rbp Mechanism: rbp = [rsp]; rsp += 8 Result: Function returns to caller's frame context.
Assembly: ret Mechanism: rip = [rsp]; rsp += 8 Outcome: Execution resumes at caller's call site.
